title: Book Theme
description: Simple site for displaying multiple articles and notebooks with a table of contents.

parts.description: The primary sidebar footer, to replace Made with MyST

options.description: Hide the table of contents
Hide the previous/next links in the footer
Hide the document outline on all pages
Hide the document title on all pages
Hide the authors list on all pages
Disable the search
The maximum depth to show on the document outline, for example, `2` would show only two depths of headings (e.g. `<H1>` and `<H2>`)
Twitter handle related to the site
Local path to favicon image
Local path to logo image
Local path to logo image for dark mode
Short text to display next to logo at the top of all pages
If specified, link logo to this URL. Otherwise, point to root page.
Alt text to attach to the logo
Google analytics key
Plausible analytics key
Show references as numbered, rather than in APA-style. Only applies to parenthetical citations
Respect nested folder structure in URL paths
A domain to treat as internal links (no external icon, opens in same tab). Supports wildcard subdomains with *. Example: "jupyter.org" or "*.jupyter.org"
Local path to a CSS file
